sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.31 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: Let$k$be a field of characteristic 0. According to (Yu.\,I.\,Merzlyakov, Proc. Stek\-lov Inst. Math., { 167} (1986), 263--266), the family${ Rep}_k(G)$of all canonical matrix representations of a$k$-powered group$G$over$k$may be regarded as an affine$k$-variety. Find an explicit form of equations defining this variety.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
